title: Biome Colors
description: [​WARNING] Biome Colors is in beta phase, biome colors is a simple DataPack. What it does is be able to choose the color of your biome using the /Fill biome command ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ default:red
body:
## Important note

Biome colors is a DataPack for version 1.21. There is no need to download forge or fabric. Just putting the Biome colors folder in your datapack folder should work for you.

## What's this mod?

“Biome Colors” is a data pack that is still in development and currently features five colors: Red, Blue, Green, Black, and White.

## What is the command I should use?

/fillbiome <from> <to> <biome>

## Example:

/fillbiome X0 Y200 Z0 X100 Y0 Z100 default:red

## How can I deactivate the block limit

To modify the limit you can use the following command:

/gamerule commandModificationBlockLimit <number>
